description.p: cbar runs local plugins on configurable intervals and renders their output as live COSMIC panel text and interactive popup actions.
It is designed for lightweight desktop workflows such as system status, developer shortcuts, network checks, timers, and other scriptable tasks.
Added publisher attribution to plugin catalog entries.
Improved plugin management with catalog removal, clearer settings actions, and local plugin directory access.
Added German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, and Simplified Chinese translations.
Added plugin catalog browsing and installation from the applet settings.
